sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n72077" key="o)dontotu/rannos" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ὀδοντο-τύραννος</orth> <pron extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="pron">[ῠ]</pron>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ὁ</gen>, a large animal, prob. <sense id="n72077.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">crocodile,</tr_> in the Indus or Ganges, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg1386.tlg001:3:10" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Ps.-Callisth.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">3.10</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
